entries.title: 1.1 Logging In
entries.description:
Authenticate as an organisation admin and open the admin dashboard.

Outcome: Signed in; land on Admin Dashboard.

Procedure (manual): Open http://localhost:3001/?org=platform-demo | Enter Email address | Enter Password | Click Sign in

Form fields: Email (e.g. helen.richardson@platform-demo.com); Password (e.g. Demo123!)

Test / recording data: EXISTING: URL ?org=platform-demo | Email helen.richardson@platform-demo.com | Password Demo123!

Replace URL for production. Source: 01-organisation-admin-guide.md

[hr-doc:org-admin--1-1]

steps.label: Sign in page — Organisation Admin for platform-demo
Admin Dashboard — Organisation Admin home

entries.title: 1.2 Understanding the Navigation
entries.description:
Reach all admin modules from the sidebar.

Outcome: User knows menu items: Dashboard, Users, Directory, Org Chart, Calendar, Tasks, Reports, Performance, Announcements, Tickets, Knowledge Centre, Partnerships, Settings, Health & Safety, Activity Log.

Procedure (manual): Use left sidebar to open each area as needed

Test / recording data: EXISTING: No input — seeded menus include Dashboard, Users, Directory, Org Chart, Calendar, Tasks, Reports, Performance, Announcements, Tickets, Knowledge Centre, Partnerships, Settings, Health & Safety, Activity Log.

Informational. Source: 01-organisation-admin-guide.md

[hr-doc:org-admin--1-2]

steps.label: Left sidebar — all primary navigation items available to Organisation Admins
Sidebar continued — Settings, Health & Safety, Activity Log at the bottom

entries.title: 1.3 Switching Admin / Employee View
entries.description:
Preview the product as an employee without losing admin access.

Outcome: View toggles between Admin and Employee.

Procedure (manual): Top bar: locate Admin / Employee toggle | Click Employee or Admin

Test / recording data: EXISTING: No input — use Admin/Employee toggle only.

Source: 01-organisation-admin-guide.md

[hr-doc:org-admin--1-3]

steps.label: Switch to Employee view — see the system from an employee's perspective
Employee view — self-service dashboard with personal tasks and leave
Switch back to Admin view — return to the full administration view

entries.title: 2.1 Dashboard Components
entries.description:
See org-wide activity and risks at a glance.

Outcome: Read activity feed, movements, task summary, celebrations, training gaps, quick links.

Procedure (manual): After login remain on Dashboard | Scroll to review widgets

Test / recording data: EXISTING: No input — dashboard widgets populated from demo org (e.g. movements, tasks, celebrations).

Source: 01-organisation-admin-guide.md

[hr-doc:org-admin--2-1]

steps.label: Admin Dashboard — activity feed and key metrics snapshot
Upcoming movements — new starters, leavers, and role changes
Task summary — overdue and upcoming items requiring attention
Celebrations — birthdays and work anniversaries across the organisation
Training gaps — compliance issues highlighted for action

entries.title: 2.2 Using Quick Actions
entries.description:
Jump to common work from the dashboard.

Outcome: New user flow, task list, or employee profile opens.

Procedure (manual): Click Add new user OR View all tasks OR click a celebration card

Form fields: N/A until destination screen

Test / recording data: EXISTING: Quick actions — Add new user opens create flow; View all tasks → Tasks; celebration cards may include e.g. Jonathan Hartley (MD).

Source: 01-organisation-admin-guide.md

[hr-doc:org-admin--2-2]

steps.label: Quick action links — Add new user, View all tasks, and other shortcuts

entries.title: 3.1 Viewing the User List
entries.description:
Find and open employee records.

Outcome: Filtered or searched list of employees.

Procedure (manual): Sidebar: Users | Use search bar | Apply filters: department, division, status, access level | Click employee name

Form fields: Search text; filter selections

Test / recording data: EXISTING: Users → search Taylor → Ben Taylor (Logistics Coordinator, Operations) OR search helen → Helen Richardson.

Source: 01-organisation-admin-guide.md

[hr-doc:org-admin--3-1]

steps.label: User list — all employees with name, email, department, job title, and status
Search users — filter by name, email, department, or job title

entries.title: 3.2 Creating a New User
entries.description:
Add an employee record and optionally invite them.

Outcome: User created; system may prompt to send invitation email.

Procedure (manual): Users | Add User | Complete fields | Save | Follow invitation prompt if shown

Form fields: Required: First name; Last name; Email address (work); Country (e.g. United Kingdom); Access level (Organisation Admin, Manager, or UK Employee). Optional: Department; Division; Job title; Employee number; Date of birth; Gender; Marital status; Phone numbers; Address

Test / recording data: NEW: First name ManualTest | Last name RecordHire | Email manualtest.hire.UNIQUE@example.com (replace UNIQUE; must not match any user in Users) | Country United Kingdom | Access UK Employee | Optional: Department Operations | Job Title QA Recording | Employee Number MT-UNIQUE | Save then invite if prompted.

Source: 01-organisation-admin-guide.md

[hr-doc:org-admin--3-2]

steps.label: User list — all employees with name, email, department, job title, and status
Search users — filter by name, email, department, or job title
Add new user — open hire wizard
New hire wizard — Personal (step 1)
Create Employee — user record saved (or validation message)

entries.title: 3.3 Editing a User Profile
entries.description:
Maintain accurate HR, pay, leave, and compliance data.

Outcome: Profile saved for that employee.

Procedure (manual): Users | Click employee | Tabs: Personal, Employment, Pay, Leave, Documents, Emergency contacts, Notes, Training, Health & Safety | Edit on a section | Save

Form fields: Tab-specific fields as shown in UI

Test / recording data: EXISTING: Users → Ben Taylor (ben.taylor@platform-demo.com) → Personal tab → Edit → change Mobile to +44 7700 899001 (example) → Save.

Source: 01-organisation-admin-guide.md

[hr-doc:org-admin--3-3]

steps.label: User list — click any employee name to open their profile
Open employee profile — click to view full details
User profile — Personal tab with name, contact details, and address
Employment tab — job title, department, division, reports to, start date
Pay tab — salary, pay group, pay schedule, currency
Leave tab — leave balances, policy assignments, and time-off history
Documents tab — uploaded files and attachments for this employee
Emergency contacts tab — next-of-kin details
Notes tab — internal admin notes about this employee
Training tab — training records and compliance status

entries.title: 3.4 Inviting a User
entries.description:
Send password-setup email.

Outcome: Invitation email with secure link sent.

Procedure (manual): Users | Open user profile | Click Send Invitation (when shown)

Form fields: Uses profile email; no separate form in guide

Test / recording data: EXISTING: Open the NEW user from 3.2 if invite available OR any user showing Send Invitation | Send Invitation.

Source: 01-organisation-admin-guide.md

[hr-doc:org-admin--3-4]

steps.label: Users — open profile for invitation
User profile — Send Invitation when available
Invitation sent — checklist for secure password setup email

entries.title: 3.5 Suspending or Removing a User
entries.description:
Block access or start leaver process.

Outcome: Suspended and/or offboarding started with checklist.

Procedure (manual): Open user profile | Suspend and/or Offboard | When prompted: enter leaving date and termination reason

Form fields: Leaving date; termination reason (offboarding)

Test / recording data: NEW (destructive): Only on disposable user: create ManualTest Leaver with unique email via 3.2 then Offboard | Leaving date +30 days from today | Reason End of fixed-term contract (test). Do not offboard real demo employees.

Source: 01-organisation-admin-guide.md

[hr-doc:org-admin--3-5]

steps.label: Users — disposable test employee only
Profile — Offboard / Suspend (do not use on real employees)
